name: Shared frontend formatting utilities
description: Centralized repeated frontend formatting and label helpers into shared utilities so Home, Insights, budgets, households, and analytics can import standardized currency, date/time, label, and download helpers without prop threading.

evidence.description: Global currency formatter and minor-unit conversion helper.
Shared date/time formatter helpers and relative-date formatting.
Household role and visibility label helpers shared across views.
Insights cards consume shared formatters directly without prop threading.

evidence.command: pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/lib/format-currency.test.ts src/lib/format-date-time.test.ts src/lib/household-labels.test.ts src/lib/group-status-label.test.ts src/lib/analytics-export.test.ts src/lib/is-editable-target.test.ts src/lib/constants/paths.test.ts src/views/app/overview/overview-formatters.test.ts src/views/app/insights/insights-period.test.ts
evidence.description: Focused formatter and period unit tests.
